title: Workshop Announcement!
excerpt: Thrilled to share that my latest online class, Here & There Inspiration is open for registration! It's something Kelly Purkey and I have spent countless hours on since the beginning of the year. There will be weekly videos from the…
body:
Thrilled to share that my latest online class, Here & There Inspiration is open for registration! It's something Kelly Purkey and I have spent countless hours on since the beginning of the year. There will be weekly videos from the both of us, along with plenty of step-by-step instructions and tips to help you seek out, sift through, and scrapbook the inspiring ideas all around you. It's part of the 4Experts Series at Big Picture Classes, and we can't wait to have you join us!

For all the details, check out Here & There Inspiration on BPC.
